summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LeadixAI dark dashboard rebuild. Dashboard home page works perfectly with all required elements. Authentication requires manual localStorage setup due to demo mode initialization issue.

authentication_issues.issue: Login form does not properly initialize demo mode authentication
authentication_issues.details: Demo mode requires manual localStorage setup. Login button gets stuck in 'Signing in...' state and doesn't complete authentication flow.

authentication_issues.issue: Sidebar navigation links not working when clicked
authentication_issues.details: Navigation links in sidebar don't respond to clicks. Direct URL access to sub-pages redirects to login due to auth state issues.

integration_issues.issue: Direct navigation to dashboard sub-pages redirects to login
integration_issues.details: Auth context not properly initialized when accessing sub-pages directly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with light theme
Pricing page uses correct light theme
Results page uses correct light theme
Dashboard home page loads with dark theme
Sidebar layout with logo and BETA badge
Upgrade to Pro CTA in sidebar
User profile footer with Demo User
Top header with breadcrumbs and search button
Stat cards with JetBrains Mono numbers
Recent Activity section with lead avatars
Quick Actions section with 3 action items
Dark color scheme (#09090B base, #111113 surface, #6C47FF brand)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix demo mode authentication initialization in auth context and login form. The login process gets stuck and doesn't complete the authentication flow. Also fix sidebar navigation links to properly route between dashboard pages.
